summary: All 8 ACs pass. Every phase has one interaction, feedback consistently uses 'In SDD gilt:' prefix, wrong answers never block, score summary uses 'X von Y richtig' format, only stdlib imports. One FR-003 placement divergence noted (AC judgment question in Review phase, not Design) — no AC covers this directly so it does not fail any criterion.

findings.description: FR-003 requires the Design phase to contain an AC judgment question ('gut formuliert / schlecht formuliert'). The Design phase instead contains the Markdown-vs-JSON/XML question (FR-002). The AC judgment question is in the Review phase. None of the 8 ACs test this placement, so no AC fails.
findings.evidence: game.py:255 Design frage = Markdown question; game.py:393 Review frage = 'Wie lautet dein Review-Urteil?'
findings.suggestion: If FR-003 placement matters, a separate AC for Design-phase content type should be added to spec.md (out of scope for this review to change).

requirements_checked.notes: Brief phase frage contains 'brief.md', 4 options, option 1 lists all 5 mandatory sections
PHASES list has exactly 7 entries, each with exactly one 'interaktion' key
ask_question always prints korrekte_opt; all feedback_falsch start with 'In SDD gilt:'
ask_question always prints '✓ Richtig!'; all feedback_richtig start with 'In SDD gilt:'
main() iterates over all PHASES unconditionally regardless of answer correctness
show_summary prints 'Dein Score: {score} von {total} Fragen richtig'
Only os, re, sys, shutil, textwrap imported — all Python stdlib

frage contains Markdown, JSON, XML — three formats present
